layout.name: chainCount
layout.title: Chain Count
layout.tooltip: The number of chains connected to the post.

layout.name: hasChainsIfNoNPC
layout.title: Always spawn with chains
layout.tooltip: Draw the chains even if no NPC is selected as the content of this post.

layout.name: chainDistance
layout.title: Chain Distance
layout.tooltip: The maximum distance (in pixels) between each chain.

layout.name: attachedSpawnOffset
layout.title: Attached NPC Spawn Offset
layout.tooltip: An offset (in pixels) that the attached NPC will spawn from.
